calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-13-2017 Vacated

Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

CROSS-DEFENDANT FRANCISCO RIORDAN'S Demurrer To Cross-Complaint is ordered OFF CALENDAR; an amended cross-complaint was filed on August 5, 2016.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Gena Eales, CSR 176, email: geales@sftc.org. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2016 Set For Trial On May-01-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Continued To Jun-22-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT TINYRX, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar. A first amended complaint was filed on February 5, 2016. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)
